calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions To Ascertain Distributees Upon Trust Termination.
Off Calendar Nov-14-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Martha Daetwyler for Jonathan Macbeath (Trustee).

The Court granted the petition in part, confirming two trustees may act and the non-relative gifts lapse and denied the request to determine beneficiaries as being premature (subject to review of order). Counsel will need to petition to determine who the beneficiaries are in 2015.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Petition For Instructions To Ascertain Distributees Upon Trust Termination.
Off Calendar Oct-21-2013 Continued To Nov-04-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
